title: Senior Backend Engineer
description: Build and scale REST APIs and microservices. You will own services in Python/Django backed by PostgreSQL, deployed on AWS with Docker. Strong system design skills expected.

title: Machine Learning Engineer
description: Design, train and deploy ML models in production. Work with PyTorch on NLP problems, ship models to AWS. Solid software engineering plus ML fundamentals required.

title: Frontend Engineer
description: Craft delightful user interfaces in React and TypeScript. Care about accessibility, performance and clean component design. Work closely with designers.

title: Data Scientist
description: Turn messy data into decisions. Build models with pandas and scikit-learn, run experiments, and communicate results. Strong statistics and SQL required.

title: DevOps Engineer
description: Own our cloud infrastructure end to end. Kubernetes, Terraform and CI/CD pipelines on AWS. Automate everything; keep systems reliable.

title: Full Stack Developer
description: Ship features across the stack in a fast-moving startup. React on the front, Node.js and MongoDB on the back. Wear many hats.

title: Product Manager
description: Own the roadmap for a B2B SaaS product. Talk to users, prioritise ruthlessly, and work with engineering in an agile setup.

title: Data Engineer
description: Build robust data pipelines. Spark and Airflow for ETL, landing clean data in the warehouse. Python and SQL heavy role on AWS.

title: Android Developer
description: Build native Android apps used by millions. Kotlin-first codebase, strong focus on performance and clean architecture.

title: Cybersecurity Analyst
description: Defend our systems. Run penetration tests, monitor for threats, and harden Linux infrastructure. Security certifications a plus.

title: Junior Backend Developer
description: Entry-level backend role. Learn on the job building Python/Flask services with SQL. Mentorship provided; curiosity valued over experience.

title: NLP Research Engineer
description: Push the state of the art in natural language processing. Deep learning with PyTorch, research mindset, publication track record welcome.
